mapper.select: select e.exercise_num, e.name, e.difficulty, e.target_muscle, e.type, g.eg_num, g.title as video_title, g.description, g.keyPoint, g.video, g.image from exercise e left join exercise_guide g on(e.exercise_num = g.exercise_num) where e.exercise_num = #{exNum}

SELECT id as egNum, title, difficulty, targetMuscle, type, description, keyPoint, image, video, reg_date as regDate FROM EXERCISE_GUIDE
AND targetMuscle = #{targetMuscle}
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY reg_date DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, 8
SELECT id as egNum, title, difficulty, targetMuscle, type, description, keyPoint, image, video, reg_date as regDate FROM EXERCISE_GUIDE WHERE id = #{egNum}
